data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Dietary/restriction tracking across stops', but the evidence provided does not include specific API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions dietary restrictions being noted and venues notified, it lacks concrete evidence of how this tracking is implemented or verified through API interactions. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or checks confirming dietary/restriction tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
